purpose: Freeze the ideal OPL family target operating architecture as a small machine-readable contract so top-level redesign stays current_owner_delta-first, resource-oriented, and contract-light.
machine_boundary: This contract governs framework target architecture boundaries, resource kinds, default lanes, and false-authority flags. It does not declare domain ready, App release ready, production ready, quality verdicts, artifact authority, memory body authority, or owner receipt authority.

resource_kinds.truth_boundary: domain truth, quality/export verdict, owner receipt, typed blocker, and direct skill path stay in the domain repository
declarative stage semantics, prompts, skills, knowledge, artifact policy, memory policy, quality gates, and authority functions
canonical workspace topology and project collection shape; aliases and inventory drift stay diagnostic unless launch or closeout would be wrong
project/study/deliverable semantic identity stays with the domain owner while OPL projects canonical physical roots
OPL owns attempt transport, currentness, event-log/read-model, quality-budget accounting, and failure diagnostics; Codex owns semantic route; domain owns receipts, quality, and artifact bodies
any output, negative result, or no-output/failure diagnostic is progress input; manifest, pointer, receipt, and quality gaps restrict claims but never block the next StageRun
owner and human answers authorize their scoped claims or irreversible actions; ordinary StageRun progression does not wait for them when a consumable artifact exists
record everything and plan from nothing until evidence folds into owner delta, hard gate, owner answer, typed blocker, human decision, or route-back
App release truth stays with the App repository and release evidence; release diagnostics do not become domain readiness
Agent Lab may propose eval, root cause, candidate fix, work order, promotion, rollback, and evidence refs but cannot claim domain verdict or production acceptance

Runway owns runtime intent admission, admission queue readiness, handoff gates, recovery repair, provider-backed orchestration refs, and control-loop status. Temporal is the durable substrate and worker supervisor is process liveness; domain truth, owner receipts, typed blockers, artifact authority, memory body, and quality verdicts stay outside OPL.

Progress Reconciler passively projects desired/current execution metadata from Codex-selected route context. It cannot accept, reject, rank, select, or override routes; write domain truth; sign receipts; create typed blockers; or evaluate quality.

experience_operating_model.purpose: Make running smoothness, output quality, and brand feel machine-readable target axes for ordinary OPL family usage without converting target-state design into readiness, L5, production, or domain-quality claims.

target_axes.success_policy: The ordinary path shows exactly one safe next action, owner wait, or blocker from current_owner_delta, while provider traces, raw worklists, route variants, cleanup gates, and release diagnostics stay explicit drilldown.

Every standard agent path carries domain pack intent, artifact policy, quality gate refs, owner answer shape, selected artifact refs, and blocker refs while leaving quality/export verdicts with the domain owner.
All default surfaces express one coherent OPL family identity, module vocabulary, and agent affordance model while preserving App release truth, domain truth, and L5 evidence ownership.

one_shot_plan_landing_model.purpose: Make the P0-P8 one-shot landing plan machine-readable so OPL can distinguish landed framework surfaces from external owner-gated readiness evidence without relying on chat or prose plans.
one_shot_plan_landing_model.default_completion_semantics: opl_landed_means_framework_contract_read_model_runtime_or_route_exists_and_is_tested; owner_gated means real domain App release L5 or production evidence still requires the named owner receipt typed blocker human gate or long-soak ref

implementation_slices.title: final_scaleout_and_release
opl_landed_surfaces: runtime Codex App runtime evidence long-soak surfaces
runtime App release user-path evidence ledger

foundry_agent_os_standard.target_shape: OPL Agent OS + Domain Declarative Pack + Domain Minimal Authority Kernel + Domain Capability Registry

opl_module_mapping.authority_boundary: Generated and hosted surfaces may expose calls, descriptors, and read models; they cannot write domain truth, sign receipts, create typed blockers, or claim quality/export verdicts.

The registry catalogs callable capability refs and use-policy hints; missing non-route-required entries fail open into advisory/audit unless current owner delta would violate source, owner identity, forbidden write, irreversible mutation, or hard reviewer/publication gate.
Console and read models project the current owner, next required delta, accepted answer shape, and hard gates; they cannot sign owner answers or replace domain owner judgment.
Runway owns attempt transport, provider currentness, quality-budget accounting, failure diagnostics, retry, dead-letter, and provider state; it cannot select or block semantic stage routes.
Ledger records refs-only evidence, receipt refs, blocker refs, and lineage; it does not store artifact or memory bodies and cannot convert refs into owner authority.
Foundry Lab and OMA may produce work orders, candidate fixes, and promotion proposals; target domain owner acceptance remains external to OPL.

capability_registry_boundary.fail_open_policy: A missing optional capability ref becomes advisory/audit. It becomes a typed blocker only when the active current_owner_delta explicitly needs the ref to protect source/data/evidence, owner-route identity, forbidden write, irreversible mutation, or reviewer/publication hard gate.

default_owner_route_policy.owner_boundary: Default CLI, skill, App, product-entry, conformance and operator readbacks route ordinary work through OPL StageRun and current_owner_delta; the domain agent remains the owner for owner receipt, typed blocker, quality/export verdict, artifact authority, and route-back refs.

flagship_experience_mapping.standard_agent_shape: Declarative Domain Pack + OPL generated/hosted surfaces + minimal authority functions
